title: Swift Online Test
text:
# Swift Online Test

Test real-world Swift skills that matter in a world with AI. Protected by AI proctoring.

## For jobseekers

Practice your skills and earn a certificate of achievement when you score in the top 25%.

Take a Practice Test

## For companies

Screen real Swift skills, flag human or AI assistance, and interview the right people.

Create a Swift Screening Test

From $7 per candidate

## About the test

The Swift online test assesses candidates' knowledge of programming in the Swift language and their ability to leverage commonly used parts of its standard library. This test requires solving live coding problems in Swift.

The assessment includes work-sample tasks such as:

* Working with classes, objects, and protocols to write reusable code.
* Fixing memory leaks.
* Implementing and properly using data structures and algorithms.

A good Swift developer needs a solid understanding of the Swift programming language as well as native data structures and language constructs.

## Sample public questions

Readable Object

Hard

10 min

code

Public

Swift

OOP

Protocols

Change the *Readable* protocol and the *ReadableObject* and *ReadOnceObject* classes, so that:

* *ReadableObject* and *ReadOnceObject* implement the *Readable* protocol.
* When the *read* method is called on the *ReadableObject* class, it returns the value that it received in the constructor.
* When the *read* method is called on the *ReadOnceObject* class it returns the value that it received in the constructor the first time it’s called and returns an empty string every other time.
* The *isReadable* method returns true in the *ReadableObject* class*.* The *isReadable* method of the *ReadOnceObject* class should return true the first time *read* is called, and false every other time.

Solve Question

User Subscription

Easy

3 min

code

Public

Swift

Memory Management

An application uses the *User* and *Subscription* classes for tracking all subscriptions that a user has purchased. Currently, the memory occupied by instances of those classes is never reclaimed.

Without changing the public API, fix the memory leak.

Solve Question

Car

3 min

Swift

Language

Select the statements that are correct.
